title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen from Settings for both updates
scenario: New DFU screen design in Settings > SW update tab shows all available updates for earbuds and charging case simultaneously, replacing the old separate update sections
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the Update button.
3. Observe the app navigates to Settings > SW update tab.
4. Verify the new DFU screen design is displayed.
5. Check that all available firmware updates are listed for the user to choose from (e.g., Emu for EB, Flamingo for EB and CC).
6. Compare with the old design which showed separate update sections for EB, CC, and all, with individual update buttons, release notes, and device images.
expected: The new DFU screen design is displayed under Settings > SW update tab, showing all available updates (e.g., Emu for EB, Flamingo for EB and CC) in a unified list for the user to choose from.
